_comment: Real-shape sample of ComfyUI's GET /history/{prompt_id} response after a successful run. Top-level key is the prompt_id. status.status_str === 'success' marks completion. outputs[<nodeId>].images carries the file refs the adapter then pulls via /view. Node id `7` matches the SaveImage node id in the Z-Image default workflow (src/providers/comfyui/workflows.ts). Replace if refreshing against a different workflow.
